    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,300;9..144,400;9..144,500;9..144,600;9..144,700;9..144,900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root{
    --bg:#080b09;
    --bg-1:#0c100d;
    --surface:rgba(255,255,255,0.035);
    --surface-hover:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    --border:rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
    --border-strong:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    --text:#f2f5ee;
    --text-dim:#a6ad9f;
    --text-faint:#6d7468;
    --emerald:#34d399;
    --emerald-2:#10b981;
    --teal:#2dd4bf;
    --sky:#38bdf8;
    --amber:#fbbf24;
    --coral:#fb7185;
    --violet:#a78bfa;
    --grad-hero: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--emerald), var(--sky) 45%, var(--violet) 80%);
    --grad-warm: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--amber), var(--coral));
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
    body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    position:relative;
    }
    ::selection{background:var(--emerald);color:#04140d;}
    h1,h2,h3,h4{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-weight:600;
    margin:0;
    letter-spacing:-0.015em;
    }
    a{color:inherit;}
    p{color:var(--text-dim);}
    .container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px; position:relative; z-index:2;}
    section{position:relative;padding:150px 0;}
    section.divider{border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
    @media(max-width:720px){ section{padding:96px 0;} .container{padding:0 22px;} }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:10px;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg);}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border-strong); border-radius:6px;}
    /* ===== AMBIENT BACKGROUND ===== */
    .aurora{position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:0; overflow:hidden; pointer-events:none;}
    .aurora .blob{position:absolute; border-radius:50%; filter:blur(110px); will-change:transform;}
    .aurora .b1{width:640px; height:640px; top:-220px; left:-160px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(52,211,153,0.32), transparent 70%); animation:float1 26s ease-in-out infinite;}
    .aurora .b2{width:560px; height:560px; top:8%; right:-180px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(56,189,248,0.26), transparent 70%); animation:float2 32s ease-in-out infinite;}
    .aurora .b3{width:700px; height:700px; bottom:-260px; left:18%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(251,191,36,0.18), transparent 70%); animation:float3 30s ease-in-out infinite;}
    .aurora .b4{width:420px; height:420px; bottom:14%; right:8%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(167,139,250,0.2), transparent 70%); animation:float1 22s ease-in-out infinite reverse;}
    @keyframes float1{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);} 50%{transform:translate(60px,40px) scale(1.12);}}
    @keyframes float2{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);} 50%{transform:translate(-50px,60px) scale(0.9);}}
    @keyframes float3{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);} 50%{transform:translate(40px,-50px) scale(1.08);}}
    .grain{position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:1; pointer-events:none; opacity:0.05; mix-blend-mode:overlay;}
    @media(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .aurora .blob{animation:none;}
    }
    /* ===== reveal-on-scroll ===== */
    .reveal{opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), transform .8s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
    .reveal.in{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
    .reveal-stagger > *{opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); transition:opacity .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(1){transition-delay:.02s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.09s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(3){transition-delay:.16s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(4){transition-delay:.23s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(5){transition-delay:.30s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(6){transition-delay:.37s;}
    .reveal-stagger.in > *:nth-child(7){transition-delay:.44s;}
    .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    letter-spacing:0.18em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    background:var(--grad-hero);
    -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:0.6em;
    font-weight:600;
    }
    .eyebrow::before{
    content:"";
    width:22px;height:1px;
    background:var(--emerald);
    display:inline-block;
    flex-shrink:0;
    }
    /* ===== NAV ===== */
    header{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:50;
    transition:background .4s, border-color .4s, backdrop-filter .4s;
    border-bottom:1px solid transparent;
    }
    header.scrolled{
    background:rgba(8,11,9,0.72);
    backdrop-filter:blur(16px) saturate(140%);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    nav.container{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:20px 32px;
    }
    .logo{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:1.08rem;
    letter-spacing:0.01em;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px;
    }
    .logo .dot{width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--grad-hero); box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(52,211,153,0.7);}
    .logo span{background:var(--grad-hero); -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
    .navlinks{display:flex; gap:8px; list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0;}
    .navlinks a{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    text-decoration:none;
    color:var(--text-dim);
    transition:color .2s, background .2s;
    padding:8px 14px;
    border-radius:20px;
    }
    .navlinks a:hover{color:var(--text); background:var(--surface);}
    @media(max-width:820px){ .navlinks{display:none;} }
    /* ===== HERO ===== */
    #hero{
    min-height:100svh;
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding-top:120px;
    }
    #hero .container{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.05fr 0.95fr; gap:60px; align-items:center;
    }
    @media(max-width:900px){ #hero .container{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .pill{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.06em;
    color:var(--text-dim); border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface);
    padding:7px 14px; border-radius:20px; margin-bottom:26px;
    }
    .pill .lv{width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--emerald); box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--emerald); animation:pulse-dot 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
    @keyframes pulse-dot{0%,100%{opacity:1;} 50%{opacity:.35;}}
    #hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(2.8rem,5.6vw,4.9rem);
    line-height:1.0;
    color:var(--text);
    }
    #hero h1 .shine{
    background:var(--grad-hero);
    background-size:300% auto;
    -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    font-style:italic; font-weight:500;
    animation:shine 6s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes shine{ to{ background-position:300% center; } }
    #hero .lede{
    max-width:48ch;
    font-size:1.12rem;
    margin-top:24px;
    color:var(--text-dim);
    }
    .cta-row{display:flex; gap:16px; margin-top:38px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .btn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.78rem;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:15px 26px;
    border-radius:10px;
    border:1px solid var(--border-strong);
    background:var(--surface);
    color:var(--text);
    cursor:pointer;
    text-decoration:none;
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
    transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), box-shadow .25s, border-color .25s, background .25s;
    }
    .btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px); border-color:var(--border-strong); background:var(--surface-hover);}
    .btn.primary{
    background:var(--grad-hero); background-size:220% auto;
    color:#04140d; border-color:transparent; font-weight:600;
    box-shadow:0 8px 30px -8px rgba(52,211,153,0.55);
    }
    .btn.primary:hover{background-position:80% center; box-shadow:0 12px 40px -6px rgba(52,211,153,0.7); transform:translateY(-2px);}
    .core-wrap{position:relative;}
    .core-card{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px;
    padding:22px; backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
    box-shadow:0 30px 80px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    transition:transform .3s ease;
    }
    .core-caption{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.66rem;
    color:var(--text-faint);
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-align:center;
    margin-top:14px;
    }
    /* ===== THESIS ===== */
    #thesis .container{max-width:840px;}
    #thesis p.big{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(1.5rem,2.7vw,2.1rem);
    color:var(--text);
    line-height:1.5;
    }
    #thesis p.big .hl{
    background:var(--grad-warm); -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    font-style:italic; font-weight:500;
    }
    .sec-head{max-width:660px; margin-bottom:60px;}
    .sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(2rem,3.6vw,2.8rem); margin-top:16px; color:var(--text);}
    .sec-head p{margin-top:18px; font-size:1.04rem;}
    /* ===== glass panel base ===== */
    .glass-panel{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.045), rgba(255,255,255,0.015));
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:22px;
    padding:36px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    box-shadow:0 40px 90px -40px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    transition:border-color .3s, transform .3s;
    }
    /* ===== RECORD ===== */
    .chart-top{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:24px;}
    .metric-readout{display:flex; gap:40px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .metric{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
    .metric .val{font-size:2.1rem; color:var(--text); font-weight:600; font-family:'Fraunces',serif; transition:color .3s;}
    .metric .val.co2{color:var(--amber); text-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(251,191,36,0.35);}
    .metric .val.temp{color:var(--coral); text-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(251,113,133,0.35);}
    .metric .lbl{font-size:0.66rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:4px;}
    .scenario-toggle{display:flex; gap:0; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:24px; overflow:hidden; background:var(--surface);}
    .scenario-toggle button{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase;
    background:transparent; color:var(--text-faint); border:none; padding:11px 18px; cursor:pointer; transition:.3s;
    }
    .scenario-toggle button.active{background:var(--grad-hero); color:#04140d; font-weight:600;}
    #timeline-svg{width:100%; height:auto; display:block;}
    .scrubber-row{margin-top:22px;}
    input[type=range]{
    -webkit-appearance:none; width:100%; height:3px; background:var(--border-strong); outline:none; border-radius:3px;
    }
    input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb{
    -webkit-appearance:none; width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--grad-hero); cursor:pointer; border:2px solid var(--bg-1);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--emerald), 0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,0.6);
    }
    input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb{
    width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--emerald); cursor:pointer; border:2px solid var(--bg-1);
    box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,0.6);
    }
    .scrub-year{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--emerald); text-align:center; margin-top:10px; letter-spacing:0.04em;}
    .chart-foot{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:22px; line-height:1.7;}
    /* ===== GLOBE ===== */
    #globe .globe-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.05fr 0.95fr; gap:44px; align-items:start;}
    @media(max-width:900px){ #globe .globe-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .globe-stage{
    position:relative; aspect-ratio:1/1; border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 42%, rgba(56,189,248,0.06), transparent 65%);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .globe-stage canvas{display:block; width:100%!important; height:100%!important; cursor:grab;}
    .globe-stage canvas:active{cursor:grabbing;}
    .globe-loading{
    position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--text-faint); transition:opacity .4s; pointer-events:none;
    }
    .globe-loading.hide{opacity:0;}
    .globe-badge{
    position:absolute; top:14px; left:14px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem;
    letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-dim);
    background:rgba(8,11,9,0.55); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px; padding:6px 12px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(6px); pointer-events:none;
    }
    .globe-legend{
    position:absolute; bottom:14px; left:14px; right:14px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.58rem; color:var(--text-faint); letter-spacing:0.06em;
    pointer-events:none;
    }
    .globe-legend .bar{height:5px; flex:1; margin:0 8px; border-radius:3px; align-self:center;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, #38bdf8, #34d399 35%, #fbbf24 68%, #fb7185);}
    .globe-controls{margin-top:18px;}
    .globe-controls .scrubber-row{margin-top:12px;}
    .globe-scrub-row{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;}
    .globe-scrub-row input[type="range"]{flex:1;}
    .globe-play-btn{
    flex:0 0 auto; width:38px; height:38px; padding:0; border-radius:50%;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.8rem;
    border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); color:var(--text);
    }
    .globe-play-btn:hover{border-color:var(--border-strong); background:var(--surface-hover); transform:none;}
    .globe-play-btn.playing{border-color:var(--sky); color:var(--sky); background:rgba(56,189,248,0.1);}
    .globe-readouts{display:flex; gap:30px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:4px;}
    .globe-readouts .metric .val{font-size:1.6rem;}
    .globe-readouts .metric .val.sea{color:var(--sky); text-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(56,189,248,0.35);}
    .globe-readouts .metric .val.ice{color:#e2e8f0; text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(226,232,240,0.3);}
    .globe-panel{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:26px 28px;
    min-height:260px;
    }
    .globe-panel .tag{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:var(--sky); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em;}
    .globe-panel h4{font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--text); margin-top:8px;}
    .globe-panel .sub{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.66rem; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:4px; letter-spacing:0.04em;}
    .globe-panel p{margin-top:12px; font-size:0.9rem;}
    .globe-stat-row{display:flex; gap:22px; margin-top:16px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .globe-stat{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;}
    .globe-stat .n{font-size:1.3rem; color:var(--text); font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:600;}
    .globe-stat .l{font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--text-faint); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-top:2px;}
    .globe-risk{display:inline-block; margin-top:14px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; padding:5px 12px; border-radius:20px; border:1px solid var(--border-strong);}
    .globe-risk.low{color:var(--emerald); border-color:var(--emerald);}
    .globe-risk.moderate{color:var(--amber); border-color:var(--amber);}
    .globe-risk.high{color:var(--coral); border-color:var(--coral);}
    .globe-risk.extreme{color:#fff; background:var(--coral); border-color:var(--coral);}
    .globe-city-list{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(128px,1fr)); gap:8px; margin-top:22px;}
    .globe-city-chip{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:10px;
    border:1px solid var(--border); background:transparent; color:var(--text-dim); cursor:pointer;
    text-align:left; transition:all .15s;
    }
    .globe-city-chip:hover{border-color:var(--border-strong); background:var(--surface-hover);}
    .globe-city-chip.active{border-color:var(--sky); color:var(--sky); background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08);}
    .globe-note{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:20px; line-height:1.7;}
    /* ===== LEDGER ===== */
    #ledger .ledger-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr; gap:56px; align-items:center;}
    @media(max-width:900px){ #ledger .ledger-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    #donut-svg{width:100%; max-width:340px; display:block; margin:0 auto;}
    .sector-list{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px;}
    .sector-row{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; padding:15px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    cursor:pointer; transition:.2s; border-radius:10px;
    }
    .sector-row:hover{background:var(--surface);}
    .sector-row.active{background:var(--surface-hover);}
    .sector-row .swatch{width:11px; height:11px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0; box-shadow:0 0 10px currentColor;}
    .sector-row .name{font-weight:500; color:var(--text); flex:1;}
    .sector-row .pct{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--text-faint); font-size:0.85rem;}
    #sector-detail{
    margin-top:22px; padding:22px 24px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; background:var(--surface);
    display:none; opacity:0; transform:translateY(-6px); transition:opacity .3s, transform .3s;
    }
    #sector-detail.show{display:block; opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
    #sector-detail p{font-size:0.9rem;}
    #sector-detail .do-list{list-style:none; padding:0; margin-top:12px;}
    #sector-detail .do-list li{font-size:0.87rem; padding-left:20px; position:relative; margin-bottom:7px; color:var(--text-dim);}
    #sector-detail .do-list li::before{content:"→"; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--sky);}
    /* ===== HUMAN DAY ===== */
    .humanday-crux .crux-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:44px; align-items:center;}
    @media(max-width:900px){ .humanday-crux .crux-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .tag-label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.64rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--amber); margin-bottom:16px;}
    .crux-shloka{border-left:2px solid var(--border-strong); padding-left:26px;}
    .deva{font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:1.5rem; color:var(--text); line-height:1.6; font-weight:500;}
    .deva.small{font-size:1.18rem; margin-top:6px; color:var(--text-dim);}
    .translit{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:16px; line-height:1.8; letter-spacing:0.01em;}
    .meaning{margin-top:18px; font-size:0.96rem; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.65;}
    .meaning .src{display:block; margin-top:8px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--text-faint); letter-spacing:0.04em;}
    .hl-inline{color:var(--text); font-style:italic;}
    .tl-filters{display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:26px;}
    .tl-chip{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.04em; padding:8px 14px; border-radius:20px;
    border:1px solid var(--border); background:transparent; color:var(--text-dim); cursor:pointer; transition:.15s;
    }
    .tl-chip:hover{border-color:var(--border-strong); background:var(--surface-hover);}
    .tl-chip.active{border-color:var(--emerald); color:var(--emerald); background:rgba(52,211,153,0.08);}
    .timeline{position:relative; padding-left:26px; border-left:1px solid var(--border);}
    .tl-item{position:relative; padding:0 0 26px 20px;}
    .tl-item:last-child{padding-bottom:0;}
    .tl-item::before{
    content:""; position:absolute; left:-31px; top:4px; width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--bg); border:2px solid var(--emerald); box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(52,211,153,0.55);
    }
    .tl-item .yr{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--emerald); letter-spacing:0.03em;}
    .tl-item .cat{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--text-faint); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; margin-left:10px;}
    .tl-item h4{font-size:1.02rem; color:var(--text); margin-top:6px; font-weight:600;}
    .tl-item p{font-size:0.88rem; margin-top:4px;}
    .tl-item.hidden{display:none;}
    /* ===== DUTY ===== */
    .duty-stats{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; margin-bottom:36px;}
    @media(max-width:800px){ .duty-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .duty-stat{border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:22px 22px; background:var(--surface);}
    .duty-stat .val{font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-weight:700; font-size:1.9rem;}
    .duty-stat .lbl{margin-top:8px; font-size:0.84rem; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.5;}
    .duty-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:16px;}
    @media(max-width:800px){ .duty-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .duty-card{
    border:1px solid var(--border); border-left:3px solid var(--card-accent, var(--emerald)); border-radius:14px;
    padding:22px 24px; transition:.2s; background:var(--surface); text-align:left; cursor:pointer;
    }
    .duty-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-strong); border-left-color:var(--card-accent, var(--emerald)); background:var(--surface-hover);}
    .duty-card.active{background:var(--surface-hover); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px var(--card-accent, var(--emerald));}
    .duty-card .n{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.64rem; color:var(--card-accent, var(--text-faint)); letter-spacing:0.06em;}
    .duty-card h5{font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:1.12rem; color:var(--text); margin-top:6px; font-weight:600;}
    .duty-card .desc{margin-top:8px; font-size:0.87rem; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.55;}
    .duty-card .practice{
    margin-top:12px; padding-top:12px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--text-faint);
    display:none; line-height:1.55;
    }
    .duty-card .practice b{color:var(--text-dim); font-weight:600;}
    .duty-card.active .practice{display:block;}
    .duty-card .toggle-hint{margin-top:10px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.64rem; color:var(--text-faint); letter-spacing:0.05em;}
    .duty-why{margin-top:40px; padding-top:32px; border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
    .duty-why > .tl-filters{margin-bottom:0;}
    #why-detail{
    margin-top:18px; padding:22px 24px; border-left:3px solid var(--why-accent, var(--sky));
    border-radius:0 16px 16px 0; background:var(--surface);
    }
    #why-detail h5{font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:1.05rem; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:8px; font-weight:600;}
    #why-detail p{font-size:0.92rem; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.6;}
    .duty-close{margin-top:22px; font-size:0.92rem; color:var(--text-dim);}
    /* ===== ACT ===== */
    #act .calc-panel{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:48px;
    }
    @media(max-width:900px){ #act .calc-panel{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    .calc-field{margin-bottom:28px;}
    .calc-field label{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:var(--text-dim); margin-bottom:12px;
    }
    .calc-field label .out{color:var(--emerald);}
    .calc-result{
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; align-items:center; text-align:center;
    border-left:1px solid var(--border); padding-left:44px;
    }
    @media(max-width:900px){ .calc-result{border-left:none; border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding-left:0; padding-top:32px;} }
    .calc-result .big-num{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:4rem; font-weight:700; line-height:1;
    background:var(--grad-warm); -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }
    .calc-result .big-num sup{font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:400; margin-left:4px;}
    .calc-result .unit{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--text-faint); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; margin-top:10px;}
    .calc-result .compare{margin-top:24px; font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--text-dim); max-width:28ch;}
    .calc-result .compare b{color:var(--sky);}
    select{
    width:100%; background:var(--surface); color:var(--text); border:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:12px 14px; border-radius:10px; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:0.92rem;
    }
    select:focus{border-color:var(--emerald);}
    /* ===== PLEDGE ===== */
    #pledge{text-align:center;}
    #pledge .container{max-width:660px;}
    #pledge h2{font-size:clamp(2.1rem,4.2vw,3rem);}
    #pledge p{margin-top:16px;}
    .pledge-form{margin-top:38px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; align-items:stretch;}
    .pledge-form select, .pledge-form input{text-align:left;}
    .pledge-count{margin-top:32px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-faint);}
    .pledge-count b{color:var(--emerald); font-size:1.05rem;}
    #pledge-confirm{
    margin-top:24px; padding:20px; border:1px solid var(--emerald); border-radius:14px; color:var(--emerald);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:0.82rem; display:none;
    background:rgba(52,211,153,0.06);
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(-8px); transition:opacity .35s, transform .35s;
    }
    #pledge-confirm.show{display:block; opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}
    footer{
    border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding:56px 0; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:0.68rem; color:var(--text-faint); text-align:center; line-height:2; position:relative; z-index:2;
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
    *{animation-duration:0.001ms !important; transition-duration:0.001ms !important;}
    }
    :focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--emerald); outline-offset:2px; border-radius:4px;}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div class="aurora" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="blob b1"></div>
    <div class="blob b2"></div>
    <div class="blob b3"></div>
    <div class="blob b4"></div>
    </div>
    <svg class="grain" aria-hidden="true"><filter id="noiseFilter"><feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.85" numOctaves="2" stitchTiles="stitch"/></filter><rect width="100%" height="100%" filter="url(#noiseFilter)"/></svg>
    <header id="site-header">
    <nav class="container">
    <div class="logo"><span class="dot"></span>MANAV <span>DAY</span></div>
    <ul class="navlinks">
    <li><a href="#humanday">Human Day</a></li>
    <li><a href="#duty">What We Owe</a></li>
    <li><a href="#record">The Record</a></li>
    <li><a href="#globe">The Globe</a></li>
    <li><a href="#ledger">The Ledger</a></li>
    <li><a href="#act">Act</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pledge">Pledge</a></li>
    </ul>
    </nav>
    </header>
    <!-- HERO -->
    <section id="hero">
    <div class="container">
    <div>
    <div class="pill"><span class="lv"></span> Manav Day · July 27 · not Earth Day</div>
    <h1>Rare life.<br>Enormous <span class="shine">reach.</span></h1>
    <p class="lede">Of every species alive, one writes its history down, reshapes coastlines, and decides — deliberately or not — which of the others survive the century. That's not a boast. It's the reason Manav Day exists: a day for the species holding the pen, and for what are we leaving behind on the page.</p>
    <div class="cta-row">
    <a href="#humanday" class="btn primary">Why this day ↓</a>
    <a href="#duty" class="btn">What we owe</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="core-wrap reveal">
    <div class="core-card">
    <svg id="hero-core" viewBox="0 0 320 420" width="100%" height="auto" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a sediment core sample showing atmospheric layers from 1850 to today"></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="core-caption">A CORE SAMPLE OF THE ATMOSPHERE · 1850 → 2026</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- THESIS -->
    <section id="thesis" class="divider">
    <div class="container reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">Why this exists</div>
    <p class="big" style="margin-top:20px;">Geologists will one day read our decades the way we read ice cores and tree rings — <span class="hl">as data</span>. The plastics in the sediment. The carbon in the air. The species that vanished on our watch. Almost none of that record was written by nature acting alone — it was written by one species with unusual reach, making ordinary decisions, billions of times a day. <span class="hl">Manav Day is the day we look at that reach on purpose</span> — and at what it's owed in return.</p>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- HUMAN DAY -->
    <section id="humanday" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">01 — Manav Day, explained</div>
    <h2>Five thousand years. A hundred of them wild.</h2>
    <p>Every other species alive today lives roughly the way its ancestors did. Humans don't. In about five thousand years of recorded civilization we went from first writing to first cities to first laws — then, in barely the last hundred of those years, from horse-drawn carts to spacecraft, candlelight to a networked planet, scattered villages to eight billion people. Manav Day marks that acceleration on purpose, instead of letting it pass unnoticed.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal humanday-crux">
    <div class="crux-grid">
    <div class="crux-shloka">
    <div class="tag-label">The crux of Manav Day</div>
    <p class="deva">नरदेह हा दुर्लभ । याचा करावा परमार्थ लाभ ।</p>
    <p class="deva small">या नरदेहाचे सार्थक करा ।</p>
    <p class="translit">Naradēha hā durlabha. Yācā karāvā paramārtha lābha.<br>Yā naradēhācē sārthaka karā.</p>
    <p class="meaning">"This human body is rare. Use it to attain the highest good — make this human life meaningful."<br><span class="src">— Samarth Ramdas, <em>Dasbodh</em></span></p>
    </div>
    <div class="crux-text">
    <p>Written in Marathi some three hundred years ago, this line says in a breath what the whole rest of this page tries to say in charts: a human life is rare, the reach that comes with it is unlike any other creature's, and that reach is only worth having if it's used well.</p>
    <p style="margin-top:14px;"><span class="hl-inline">Rare capability creates a responsibility no other species has to carry.</span> Not a punishment for being human — the actual point of it.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-head reveal" style="margin-top:80px; margin-bottom:36px;">
    <div class="eyebrow">One day, chosen almost at random</div>
    <h2 style="font-size:clamp(1.5rem,2.6vw,2rem);">July 27, across the centuries.</h2>
    <p>Manav Day falls on July 27 — a date with no special claim of its own, which is rather the point: pick any day on the calendar and this much has happened on it. Armistices, monarchies, inventions that outlived their inventors. Filter the record below.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="tl-filters" id="tl-filters"></div>
    <div class="timeline" id="tl-list"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- DUTY -->
    <section id="duty" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">02 — The Debt</div>
    <h2>Capability is not innocence.</h2>
    <p>Manav Day isn't a victory lap. Being the one species that can rewrite a planet's chemistry means being the one species that owes something back for it. There's no single verdict on what, exactly — cultures, religions, and scientists frame it differently — but across nearly all of them, the same debts keep showing up.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="duty-stats reveal-stagger reveal">
    <div class="duty-stat">
    <div class="val" style="color:var(--emerald);">1 of ~8.7M</div>
    <div class="lbl">Species on Earth with the power to reshape all the others</div>
    </div>
    <div class="duty-stat">
    <div class="val" style="color:var(--sky);">~5,000 yrs</div>
    <div class="lbl">Of recorded civilization — the span this whole page covers</div>
    </div>
    <div class="duty-stat">
    <div class="val" style="color:var(--coral);">~100 yrs</div>
    <div class="lbl">Long enough to end diseases and warm the planet, at once</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="scenario-toggle" id="duty-toggle" style="margin-bottom:28px;">
    <button data-set="earth" class="active">To the Earth</button>
    <button data-set="animals">To Other Species</button>
    </div>
    <div class="duty-grid" id="duty-grid"></div>
    <div class="duty-why">
    <div class="tag-label" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Why anyone thinks this, exactly</div>
    <div class="tl-filters" id="why-filters"></div>
    <div id="why-detail"></div>
    <p class="duty-close">Four different reasons. Same conclusion the shloka above already reached: <span class="hl-inline">rare capability only means something if it gets used well.</span></p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- RECORD -->
    <section id="record" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">03 — The Record</div>
    <h2>176 years, told in carbon and heat.</h2>
    <p>Drag the marker to move through time. Watch how closely temperature follows what we put in the air — and how far apart the two paths ahead of us really are.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="chart-top">
    <div class="metric-readout">
    <div class="metric"><div class="val co2" id="readout-co2">280</div><div class="lbl">CO₂, ppm</div></div>
    <div class="metric"><div class="val temp" id="readout-temp">+0.0°C</div><div class="lbl">Temp vs. 1850</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scenario-toggle" id="scenario-toggle">
    <button data-scenario="current" class="active">If we stay the course</button>
    <button data-scenario="action">If we act now</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <svg id="timeline-svg" viewBox="0 0 900 320" role="img" aria-label="Line chart of global CO2 concentration and temperature anomaly from 1850 to 2100"></svg>
    <div class="scrubber-row">
    <input type="range" id="year-scrub" min="1850" max="2100" step="1" value="2026">
    <div class="scrub-year" id="scrub-year-label">2026 — TODAY</div>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-foot">FIGURES ARE ILLUSTRATIVE, ROUNDED APPROXIMATIONS OF PUBLISHED CLIMATE-SCIENCE TRENDS (IPCC-STYLE PATHWAYS), NOT A FORECAST. "STAY THE COURSE" AND "ACT NOW" SKETCH TWO PLAUSIBLE FUTURES, NOT PRECISE PREDICTIONS.</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- GLOBE -->
    <section id="globe" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">04 — The Globe</div>
    <h2>Spin the planet. Move through time.</h2>
    <p>The same story, live on the surface of the Earth. Drag through 1850–2100 and watch color, sea level, and polar ice respond — or hit play and let time run. Click any capital to see how it lands there specifically.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="globe-grid">
    <div>
    <div class="globe-stage" id="globe-stage">
    <div class="globe-badge" id="globe-year-badge">2026 — TODAY</div>
    <div class="globe-legend">
    <span>COOLER</span>
    <span class="bar"></span>
    <span>HOTTER</span>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-loading" id="globe-loading">Loading planet…</div>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-controls">
    <div class="globe-readouts">
    <div class="metric"><div class="val temp" id="globe-readout-temp">+0.0°C</div><div class="lbl">Global temp vs. 1850</div></div>
    <div class="metric"><div class="val sea" id="globe-readout-sea">+0 cm</div><div class="lbl">Mean sea level vs. 1850</div></div>
    <div class="metric"><div class="val ice" id="globe-readout-ice">100%</div><div class="lbl">Polar ice extent, indexed</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="scrubber-row globe-scrub-row">
    <button class="btn globe-play-btn" id="globe-play-btn" type="button" aria-label="Play through time">
    <span id="globe-play-icon">▶</span>
    </button>
    <input type="range" id="globe-year-scrub" min="1850" max="2100" step="1" value="2026">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-note">GLOBE COLORING, SEA-LEVEL SHELL, AND ICE CAPS ARE STYLIZED AND EXAGGERATED FOR VISIBILITY — ILLUSTRATIVE, NOT TO SCALE. DRIVEN BY THE SAME "STAY THE COURSE" / "ACT NOW" PATHWAYS AS THE RECORD ABOVE.</div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div class="globe-panel" id="globe-panel">
    <div class="tag">Global view</div>
    <h4>Click a capital to zoom in</h4>
    <p>Warming isn't even. High-latitude cities heat up fastest; low-lying capitals face the most sea-level exposure. Rotate the globe or pick a city below to compare.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-city-list" id="globe-city-list"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- LEDGER -->
    <section id="ledger" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">05 — The Ledger</div>
    <h2>Who's responsible, exactly?</h2>
    <p>"Humanity" isn't a useful unit of blame. Emissions come from specific systems — energy, food, industry, transport. Click a sector to see who's actually holding the pen, and where pressure works.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="ledger-grid">
    <svg id="donut-svg" viewBox="0 0 240 240" role="img" aria-label="Donut chart of global greenhouse gas emissions by sector"></svg>
    <div>
    <div class="sector-list" id="sector-list"></div>
    <div id="sector-detail"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- ACT -->
    <section id="act" class="divider">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow">06 — Act</div>
    <h2>Your rough footprint, this year.</h2>
    <p>No calculator captures a life. But seeing the shape of your impact — and which lever actually moves it — is where most people start.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="glass-panel reveal">
    <div class="calc-panel">
    <div>
    <div class="calc-field">
    <label>Diet <span class="out" id="out-diet">Omnivore, average</span></label>
    <input type="range" id="in-diet" min="0" max="3" step="1" value="1">
    </div>
    <div class="calc-field">
    <label>Car travel per week <span class="out" id="out-car">80 mi</span></label>
    <input type="range" id="in-car" min="0" max="400" step="10" value="80">
    </div>
    <div class="calc-field">
    <label>Round-trip flights per year <span class="out" id="out-flights">1</span></label>
    <input type="range" id="in-flights" min="0" max="10" step="1" value="1">
    </div>
    <div class="calc-field">
    <label>Home energy source <span class="out" id="out-energy">Grid mix</span></label>
    <input type="range" id="in-energy" min="0" max="2" step="1" value="0">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="calc-result">
    <div class="big-num" id="calc-total">7.4<sup>t</sup></div>
    <div class="unit">Est. tons CO₂e / year</div>
    <div class="compare" id="calc-compare">Roughly the global average. A <b>1.5°C-aligned</b> path needs this closer to <b>2 tons</b> per person by 2050 — mostly through systemic change, not willpower alone.</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- PLEDGE -->
    <section id="pledge" class="divider">
    <div class="container reveal">
    <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;">07 — Add your layer</div>
    <h2>The record isn't finished.</h2>
    <p>Pick one thing you'll actually do — not everything, one thing — and it becomes part of this page's public tally. Small, kept commitments compound faster than big, abandoned ones.</p>
    <div class="pledge-form">
    <select id="pledge-action">
    <option value="">Choose one action…</option>
    <option>Eat plant-forward at least 4 days a week</option>
    <option>Fly less — combine or cut one trip a year</option>
    <option>Switch to renewable/green energy at home</option>
    <option>Drive less — walk, bike, or take transit weekly</option>
    <option>Vote and organize for climate policy locally</option>
    <option>Cut food waste — plan meals, use what I buy</option>
    <option>Talk about it — one honest conversation a month</option>
    </select>
    <button class="btn primary" id="pledge-submit" style="justify-content:center;">Sign the record</button>
    </div>
    <div id="pledge-confirm"></div>
    <div class="pledge-count" id="pledge-count">Loading the tally…</div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <footer>
    <div class="container">
    MANAV DAY — a rare species, taking stock of what it's doing with the reach it has.<br>
    Climate figures are rounded, illustrative approximations of widely published trends, not precise forecasts or citations of any single dataset.<br>
    Built to be shared. Made of type, data, and the assumption that people act differently once they can see the shape of things.
    </div>
    </footer>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.128.0/build/three.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.128.0/examples/js/controls/OrbitControls.js"></script>
    <script>
    /* ============ NAV SCROLL STATE ============ */
    const headerEl = document.getElementById('site-header');
    function updateHeader(){ headerEl.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20); }
    document.addEventListener('scroll', updateHeader, {passive:true});
    updateHeader();
    /* ============ SCROLL REVEAL ============ */
    const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-stagger');
    const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
    }, {threshold:0.12, rootMargin:'0px 0px -60px 0px'});
    revealEls.forEach(el=>io.observe(el));
    /* ============ HERO CORE SVG (with subtle parallax) ============ */
    (function(){
    const svg = document.getElementById('hero-core');
    const layers = [
    {y0:0,y1:60,color:'#34d399',label:'2026'},
    {y0:60,y1:130,color:'#2fbd93',label:'2000'},
    {y0:130,y1:210,color:'#2aa189',label:'1980'},
    {y0:210,y1:300,color:'#24847d',label:'1950'},
    {y0:300,y1:400,color:'#1c5f61',label:'1850'},
    ];
    let svgStr = `<defs>
    <linearGradient id="coreShine" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#000" stop-opacity="0.3"/>
    <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#fff" stop-opacity="0.08"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
    </linearGradient>
    </defs>`;
    layers.forEach((l)=>{
    svgStr += `<rect x="70" y="${l.y0+10}" width="140" height="${l.y1-l.y0}" fill="${l.color}"/>`;
    svgStr += `<rect x="70" y="${l.y0+10}" width="140" height="${l.y1-l.y0}" fill="url(#coreShine)"/>`;
    svgStr += `<text x="222" y="${(l.y0+l.y1)/2+14}" fill="#6d7468" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="11">${l.label}</text>`;
    svgStr += `<line x1="212" y1="${(l.y0+l.y1)/2+10}" x2="218" y2="${(l.y0+l.y1)/2+10}" stroke="#6d7468" stroke-width="1"/>`;
    });
    svgStr += `<rect x="70" y="10" width="140" height="400" fill="none" stroke="#f2f5ee" stroke-opacity="0.18" stroke-width="1.5" rx="4"/>`;
    let pathPts = [];
    for(let i=0;i<=40;i++){
    const t = i/40;
    const yy = 410 - t*400;
    const co2 = 280 + Math.pow(t,2.4)*145;
    const xx = 70 + ((co2-280)/145)*140;
    pathPts.push(`${xx.toFixed(1)},${yy.toFixed(1)}`);
    }
    svgStr += `<polyline points="${pathPts.join(' ')}" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.95" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(251,191,36,0.6));"/>`;
    const lastPt = pathPts[pathPts.length-1].split(',');
    svgStr += `<circle cx="${lastPt[0]}" cy="${lastPt[1]}" r="4.5" fill="#fbbf24" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(251,191,36,0.9));"/>`;
    svgStr += `<text x="70" y="30" fill="#fbbf24" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="10">← CO₂ CONCENTRATION</text>`;
    svg.innerHTML = svgStr;
    const wrap = document.querySelector('.core-card');
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e)=>{
    const rect = wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
    if(rect.top > window.innerHeight || rect.bottom < 0) return;
    const cx = rect.left+rect.width/2, cy = rect.top+rect.height/2;
    const dx = (e.clientX-cx)/rect.width, dy = (e.clientY-cy)/rect.height;
    wrap.style.transform = `perspective(800px) rotateY(${dx*5}deg) rotateX(${-dy*5}deg)`;
    }, {passive:true});
    })();
    /* ============ TIMELINE CHART ============ */
    const timelineData = (()=>{
    const years = [];
    for(let y=1850;y<=2100;y+=2) years.push(y);
    function co2Current(y){
    if(y<=2026){
    const t=(y-1850)/(2026-1850);
    return 280 + Math.pow(t,2.3)*145;
    } else {
    const t=(y-2026)/(2100-2026);
    return 425 + Math.pow(t,1.15)*280;
    }
    }
    function co2Action(y){
    if(y<=2026) return co2Current(y);
    const t=(y-2026)/(2100-2026);
    const peak = 440;
    const rise = Math.min(t/0.25,1);
    const co2peak = 425 + rise*(peak-425);
    const fall = Math.max((t-0.25)/0.75,0);
    return co2peak - fall*(peak-320);
    }
    function tempFromCo2(c){ return Math.log(c/280)/Math.log(2) * 3.0; }
    return years.map(y=>{
    const cCur = co2Current(y);
    const cAct = y<=2026 ? cCur : co2Action(y);
    return { year:y, co2Cur: cCur, co2Act: cAct, tempCur: tempFromCo2(cCur), tempAct: tempFromCo2(cAct) };
    });
    })();
    let currentScenario = 'current';
    const chartSvg = document.getElementById('timeline-svg');
    const CW=900, CH=320, PAD_L=54, PAD_R=20, PAD_T=20, PAD_B=34;
    const yearMin=1850, yearMax=2100;
    function xForYear(y){ return PAD_L + ( (y-yearMin)/(yearMax-yearMin) ) * (CW-PAD_L-PAD_R); }
    function yForCo2(c){ const min=260,max=750; return CH-PAD_B - ((c-min)/(max-min))*(CH-PAD_T-PAD_B); }
    function yForTemp(t){ const min=-0.2,max=4.4; return CH-PAD_B - ((t-min)/(max-min))*(CH-PAD_T-PAD_B); }
    function buildTimelineChart(){
    let s = '';
    for(let y=1850;y<=2100;y+=50){
    const x = xForYear(y);
    s += `<line x1="${x}" y1="${PAD_T}" x2="${x}" y2="${CH-PAD_B}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
    s += `<text x="${x}" y="${CH-PAD_B+18}" fill="#6d7468" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">${y}</text>`;
    }
    const todayX = xForYear(2026);
    s += `<line x1="${todayX}" y1="${PAD_T}" x2="${todayX}" y2="${CH-PAD_B}" stroke="#f2f5ee" stroke-opacity="0.25" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/>`;
    const co2Key = currentScenario==='current' ? 'co2Cur' : 'co2Act';
    const tempKey = currentScenario==='current' ? 'tempCur' : 'tempAct';
    const co2Pts = timelineData.map(d=>`${xForYear(d.year).toFixed(1)},${yForCo2(d[co2Key]).toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
    const tempPts = timelineData.map(d=>`${xForYear(d.year).toFixed(1)},${yForTemp(d[tempKey]).toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
    const altKey = currentScenario==='current' ? 'co2Act' : 'co2Cur';
    const altPts = timelineData.filter(d=>d.year>=2026).map(d=>`${xForYear(d.year).toFixed(1)},${yForCo2(d[altKey]).toFixed(1)}`).join(' ');
    s += `<polyline points="${altPts}" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-opacity="0.22" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4"/>`;
    s += `<polyline id="co2-line" points="${co2Pts}" fill="none" stroke="#fbbf24" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(251,191,36,0.5));"/>`;
    s += `<polyline id="temp-line" points="${tempPts}" fill="none" stroke="#fb7185" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(251,113,133,0.5));"/>`;
    const scrubYear = parseInt(document.getElementById('year-scrub').value,10);
    const sx = xForYear(scrubYear);
    const d = timelineData.reduce((a,b)=>Math.abs(b.year-scrubYear)<Math.abs(a.year-scrubYear)?b:a);
    const co2y = yForCo2(d[co2Key]);
    const tempy = yForTemp(d[tempKey]);
    s += `<line x1="${sx}" y1="${PAD_T}" x2="${sx}" y2="${CH-PAD_B}" stroke="#f2f5ee" stroke-opacity="0.4" stroke-width="1"/>`;
    s += `<circle cx="${sx}" cy="${co2y}" r="5.5" fill="#fbbf24" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(251,191,36,0.9));"/>`;
    s += `<circle cx="${sx}" cy="${tempy}" r="5.5" fill="#fb7185" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(251,113,133,0.9));"/>`;
    s += `<text x="${PAD_L}" y="14" fill="#fbbf24" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="10">CO₂ (ppm)</text>`;
    s += `<text x="${PAD_L+90}" y="14" fill="#fb7185" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="10">TEMP ANOMALY</text>`;
    chartSvg.innerHTML = s;
    document.getElementById('readout-co2').textContent = Math.round(d[co2Key]);
    document.getElementById('readout-temp').textContent = (d[tempKey]>=0?'+':'') + d[tempKey].toFixed(1) + '°C';
    document.getElementById('scrub-year-label').textContent = scrubYear===2026 ? '2026 — TODAY' : (scrubYear<2026? scrubYear+' — RECORDED' : scrubYear+' — PROJECTED');
    }
    buildTimelineChart();
    document.getElementById('year-scrub').addEventListener('input', buildTimelineChart);
    document.querySelectorAll('#scenario-toggle button').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('#scenario-toggle button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    currentScenario = btn.dataset.scenario;
    buildTimelineChart();
    });
    });
    /* ============ LEDGER / DONUT ============ */
    const sectors = [
    {name:'Energy & Electricity', pct:34, color:'#fbbf24',
    desc:'Burning coal, oil, and gas to generate power and heat is the single largest source of global emissions.',
    who:"Utilities, power-grid regulators, and national energy policy hold most of the leverage here.",
    actions:["Support your utility's renewable energy or green-tariff options",'Back local clean-energy and grid policy','Improve home efficiency — insulation, heat pumps, LED lighting']},
    {name:'Agriculture & Land Use', pct:22, color:'#fb7185',
    desc:'Livestock, deforestation, and fertilizer use release methane, CO₂, and nitrous oxide.',
    who:'Agribusiness, land-use policy, and consumer demand for meat and dairy all play a role.',
    actions:['Shift toward plant-forward meals a few days a week','Reduce food waste — it wastes the emissions behind it too','Support deforestation-free supply chain policy']},
    {name:'Industry & Manufacturing', pct:24, color:'#38bdf8',
    desc:'Cement, steel, chemicals, and general manufacturing are energy- and process-intensive.',
    who:'Mostly a corporate and industrial-policy problem — individual choices matter less here than regulation and procurement standards.',
    actions:['Support carbon pricing and industrial emissions standards','Favor brands that publish credible emissions-reduction targets','Push employers or institutions to buy responsibly']},
    {name:'Transportation', pct:15, color:'#34d399',
    desc:'Cars, trucks, shipping, and aviation burn fossil fuels directly.',
    who:'Split between individual travel habits and transport infrastructure/policy.',
    actions:['Drive less where transit, biking, or walking work','Combine or reduce flights, and offset thoughtfully if you do fly','Support public transit investment locally']},
    {name:'Buildings', pct:5, color:'#a78bfa',
    desc:'Heating, cooling, and construction materials for homes and offices.',
    who:'A mix of building codes, landlords, and household energy choices.',
    actions:['Seal drafts and upgrade insulation where you can','Choose efficient appliances and heat pumps over gas','Support stronger building energy codes']},
    ];
    function buildDonut(){
    const svg = document.getElementById('donut-svg');
    const cx=120, cy=120, r=88, rInner=54;
    let angle = -90;
    let s='';
    sectors.forEach(sec=>{
    const sweep = sec.pct/100*360;
    const a0 = angle*Math.PI/180, a1=(angle+sweep)*Math.PI/180;
    const x0 = cx+r*Math.cos(a0), y0=cy+r*Math.sin(a0);
    const x1 = cx+r*Math.cos(a1), y1=cy+r*Math.sin(a1);
    const xi0 = cx+rInner*Math.cos(a1), yi0=cy+rInner*Math.sin(a1);
    const xi1 = cx+rInner*Math.cos(a0), yi1=cy+rInner*Math.sin(a0);
    const large = sweep>180?1:0;
    s += `<path data-name="${sec.name}" class="donut-slice" d="M${x0},${y0} A${r},${r} 0 ${large} 1 ${x1},${y1} L${xi0},${yi0} A${rInner},${rInner} 0 ${large} 0 ${xi1},${yi1} Z" fill="${sec.color}" stroke="#080b09" stroke-width="3" style="cursor:pointer; transition:opacity .2s, transform .2s; transform-origin:${cx}px ${cy}px; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px ${sec.color}66);"/>`;
    angle += sweep;
    });
    s += `<text x="${cx}" y="${cy-4}" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f5ee" font-family="Fraunces, serif" font-size="22" font-weight="700">100%</text>`;
    s += `<text x="${cx}" y="${cy+16}" text-anchor="middle" fill="#6d7468" font-family="IBM Plex Mono, monospace" font-size="9">GLOBAL GHG</text>`;
    svg.innerHTML = s;
    svg.querySelectorAll('.donut-slice').forEach(slice=>{
    slice.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectSector(slice.dataset.name));
    slice.addEventListener('mouseenter', ()=>{ slice.style.opacity=0.85; slice.style.transform+=' scale(1.03)'; });
    slice.addEventListener('mouseleave', ()=>{ slice.style.opacity=1; slice.style.transform=slice.style.transform.replace(' scale(1.03)',''); });
    });
    }
    buildDonut();
    function buildSectorList(){
    const wrap = document.getElementById('sector-list');
    wrap.innerHTML = sectors.map(s=>`
    <div class="sector-row" data-name="${s.name}">
    <span class="swatch" style="background:${s.color}; color:${s.color}"></span>
    <span class="name">${s.name}</span>
    <span class="pct">${s.pct}%</span>
    </div>`).join('');
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.sector-row').forEach(row=>{
    row.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectSector(row.dataset.name));
    });
    }
    buildSectorList();
    function selectSector(name){
    const sec = sectors.find(s=>s.name===name);
    if(!sec) return;
    document.querySelectorAll('.sector-row').forEach(r=>r.classList.toggle('active', r.dataset.name===name));
    const detail = document.getElementById('sector-detail');
    detail.innerHTML = `
    <h4 style="color:var(--text); font-size:1.08rem;">${sec.name} — ${sec.pct}% of global emissions</h4>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;">${sec.desc}</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;"><strong>Who holds the lever:</strong> ${sec.who}</p>
    <ul class="do-list">${sec.actions.map(a=>`<li>${a}</li>`).join('')}</ul>
    `;
    detail.classList.add('show');
    }
    /* ============ HUMAN DAY TIMELINE ============ */
    const tlEvents = [
    {year:1214, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Battle of Bouvines', desc:'King Philip II of France defeated a rival coalition led by Otto IV, a turning point that strengthened the French monarchy for centuries.'},
    {year:1694, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Bank of England founded', desc:'Established to help fund a war effort, it evolved into the model for modern central banking worldwide.'},
    {year:1750, cat:'Notable Deaths', title:'Johann Sebastian Bach dies', desc:'One of history\u2019s greatest composers, whose work still shapes how music is taught and written.'},
    {year:1789, cat:'Politics & World', title:'US Department of State established', desc:'Originally the Department of Foreign Affairs, signed into law by George Washington.'},
    {year:1794, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Fall of Robespierre', desc:'Maximilien Robespierre was arrested, ending the Reign of Terror and closing a defining chapter of the French Revolution.'},
    {year:1802, cat:'Notable Births', title:'Alexandre Dumas born', desc:'Author of The Three Musketeers and The Count of Monte Cristo.'},
    {year:1830, cat:'Politics & World', title:'The July Revolution begins', desc:'Three days of uprising in France forced King Charles X to abdicate and brought Louis-Philippe to the throne.'},
    {year:1866, cat:'Science & Innovation', title:'First transatlantic cable completed', desc:'Cyrus Field finished laying the first successful telegraph cable between North America and Europe, collapsing weeks of travel time into minutes of messaging.'},
    {year:1909, cat:'Science & Innovation', title:'First official US Army flight test', desc:'Orville Wright flew himself and a passenger for over an hour above Fort Myer, Virginia, in the Army\u2019s first airplane.'},
    {year:1921, cat:'Science & Innovation', title:'Insulin isolated', desc:'Frederick Banting and Charles Best successfully isolated insulin at the University of Toronto, a breakthrough that has since saved millions of lives.'},
    {year:1940, cat:'Arts & Culture', title:'Bugs Bunny\u2019s debut', desc:'Bugs Bunny made his official debut in the animated short A Wild Hare.'},
    {year:1949, cat:'Science & Innovation', title:'First jet airliner takes flight', desc:'The De Havilland Comet made its maiden test flight in England, opening the era of jet passenger travel.'},
    {year:1953, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Korean War Armistice', desc:'The armistice was signed at Panmunjom, ending active fighting \u2014 though no formal peace treaty has been signed since.'},
    {year:1955, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Austrian State Treaty takes effect', desc:'Restored Austria as a sovereign, democratic country and ended the Allied occupation after World War II.'},
    {year:1972, cat:'Notable Births', title:'Maya Rudolph born', desc:'Actor and comedian, longtime cast member of Saturday Night Live.'},
    {year:1974, cat:'Politics & World', title:'US v. Nixon tapes ruling', desc:'The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that President Nixon had to release White House recordings \u2014 a pivotal Watergate moment.'},
    {year:1981, cat:'Arts & Culture', title:'Wedding of Charles and Diana', desc:'Watched by hundreds of millions worldwide at St Paul\u2019s Cathedral.'},
    {year:1984, cat:'Notable Births', title:'Taylor Schilling born', desc:'Actor, known for Orange Is the New Black.'},
    {year:1996, cat:'Politics & World', title:'Atlanta Olympic Park bombing', desc:'A bomb exploded at Centennial Olympic Park during the Summer Olympics, killing one person and injuring over a hundred.'},
    {year:2003, cat:'Notable Deaths', title:'Bob Hope dies', desc:'Entertainer and comedian whose career spanned vaudeville, film, radio, and television.'},
    {year:2012, cat:'Arts & Culture', title:'London Olympics open', desc:'Queen Elizabeth II officially opened the Summer Games in a ceremony directed by Danny Boyle, the third time London hosted the Olympics.'}
    ];
    const tlCats = ['All','Politics & World','Science & Innovation','Arts & Culture','Notable Births','Notable Deaths'];
    let tlActive = 'All';
    function buildTlFilters(){
    const wrap = document.getElementById('tl-filters');
    wrap.innerHTML = tlCats.map(c=>`<button class="tl-chip${c==='All'?' active':''}" data-cat="${c}">${c}</button>`).join('');
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.tl-chip').forEach(chip=>{
    chip.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    tlActive = chip.dataset.cat;
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.tl-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.cat===tlActive));
    renderTimeline();
    });
    });
    }
    function renderTimeline(){
    const list = document.getElementById('tl-list');
    list.innerHTML = tlEvents.map(e=>`
    <div class="tl-item${(tlActive!=='All' && e.cat!==tlActive)?' hidden':''}">
    <span class="yr">${e.year}</span><span class="cat">${e.cat}</span>
    <h4>${e.title}</h4>
    <p>${e.desc}</p>
    </div>`).join('');
    }
    buildTlFilters();
    renderTimeline();
    /* ============ DUTY SECTION ============ */
    const dutySets = {
    earth: [
    {name:'Stewardship', color:'var(--emerald)', desc:'Using natural resources in ways that don\u2019t permanently damage ecosystems or leave future generations worse off.', practice:'A fishery that limits its catch so the stock is still there in twenty years.'},
    {name:'Restraint', color:'var(--sky)', desc:'Recognizing that the planet has finite resources, and that human activity has consequences that outlast any one decision.', practice:'Choosing not to extract or build something just because the technology now allows it.'},
    {name:'Restoration', color:'var(--teal)', desc:'Repairing environmental damage where possible \u2014 restoring forests, wetlands, rivers, and degraded habitats.', practice:'Replanting a mangrove coastline that once buffered storms and nurseries alike.'},
    {name:'Gratitude', color:'var(--amber)', desc:'Appreciating that human life itself depends on healthy air, water, soil, and biodiversity \u2014 none of which we made.', practice:'Treating a clean river as something inherited, not something owed to you by default.'}
    ],
    animals: [
    {name:'Avoiding suffering', color:'var(--coral)', desc:'Whether animals are companions, livestock, or wildlife, minimizing pain and distress is a widely shared principle across ethical traditions.', practice:'Farming and research standards that exist specifically to reduce unnecessary pain.'},
    {name:'Intrinsic value', color:'var(--violet)', desc:'Some philosophies hold that animals have worth beyond their usefulness to humans \u2014 that they matter on their own terms.', practice:'Protecting a species with no commercial value simply because it exists.'},
    {name:'Protecting habitats', color:'var(--teal)', desc:'Many species depend entirely on ecosystems that humans now have the power to preserve or destroy.', practice:'A wildlife corridor left uncut between two developments so migration still works.'},
    {name:'Responsible coexistence', color:'var(--sky)', desc:'Balancing human needs with the well-being of other species, especially where our activity reshapes their world.', practice:'Rerouting a shipping lane a few miles to avoid a whale migration path.'}
    ]
    };
    let dutyActiveSet = 'earth';
    let dutyActiveIdx = 0;
    function buildDutyGrid(){
    const grid = document.getElementById('duty-grid');
    const items = dutySets[dutyActiveSet];
    grid.innerHTML = items.map((d,i)=>`
    <button class="duty-card${i===dutyActiveIdx?' active':''}" data-i="${i}" style="--card-accent:${d.color};">
    <div class="n">0${i+1}</div>
    <h5>${d.name}</h5>
    <p class="desc">${d.desc}</p>
    <div class="practice"><b>In practice:</b> ${d.practice}</div>
    <div class="toggle-hint">${i===dutyActiveIdx?'\u2212 hide example':'+ show example'}</div>
    </button>`).join('');
    grid.querySelectorAll('.duty-card').forEach(card=>{
    card.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectDuty(parseInt(card.dataset.i,10)));
    });
    }
    function selectDuty(i){
    dutyActiveIdx = (dutyActiveIdx===i) ? -1 : i;
    buildDutyGrid();
    }
    document.getElementById('duty-toggle').querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    dutyActiveSet = btn.dataset.set;
    dutyActiveIdx = 0;
    document.getElementById('duty-toggle').querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b===btn));
    buildDutyGrid();
    });
    });
    buildDutyGrid();
    const whyPerspectives = [
    {name:'Scientific', color:'var(--sky)', desc:'Humans are part of interconnected ecosystems. Protecting nature also protects human health, food security, and climate stability \u2014 self-interest and stewardship point the same direction.'},
    {name:'Religious', color:'var(--amber)', desc:'Many faiths teach that humans are caretakers or stewards of creation, entrusted with something they didn\u2019t make and don\u2019t fully own.'},
    {name:'Philosophical', color:'var(--violet)', desc:'The capacity to reason and make moral choices is often argued to create responsibility toward beings that are more vulnerable and can\u2019t make that argument for themselves.'},
    {name:'Indigenous', color:'var(--emerald)', desc:'Many Indigenous traditions view humans as one part of a larger community of life, with reciprocal responsibilities to land, animals, and future generations \u2014 not separate from nature, but answerable to it.'}
    ];
    function buildWhyFilters(){
    const wrap = document.getElementById('why-filters');
    wrap.innerHTML = whyPerspectives.map((w,i)=>`<button class="tl-chip${i===0?' active':''}" data-i="${i}">${w.name}</button>`).join('');
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.tl-chip').forEach(chip=>{
    chip.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.tl-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.toggle('active', c===chip));
    renderWhy(parseInt(chip.dataset.i,10));
    });
    });
    }
    function renderWhy(i){
    const w = whyPerspectives[i];
    const panel = document.getElementById('why-detail');
    panel.style.setProperty('--why-accent', w.color);
    panel.innerHTML = `<h5>The ${w.name.toLowerCase()} case</h5><p>${w.desc}</p>`;
    }
    buildWhyFilters();
    renderWhy(0);
    /* ============ CALCULATOR (with animated count-up) ============ */
    const dietLabels = ['Vegan / plant-based','Vegetarian','Omnivore, average','Meat-heavy, daily'];
    const dietVals = [1.5, 2.2, 3.3, 4.6];
    const energyLabels = ['Grid mix','Mostly renewable','Mostly coal/gas'];
    const energyVals = [2.0, 0.6, 3.2];
    let displayedTotal = 7.4;
    function animateNumber(el, from, to, suffix){
    const start = performance.now();
    const dur = 500;
    function step(now){
    const t = Math.min((now-start)/dur, 1);
    const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1-t, 3);
    const val = from + (to-from)*eased;
    el.innerHTML = val.toFixed(1) + suffix;
    if(t<1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }
    function updateCalc(){
    const dietIdx = +document.getElementById('in-diet').value;
    const carMi = +document.getElementById('in-car').value;
    const flights = +document.getElementById('in-flights').value;
    const energyIdx = +document.getElementById('in-energy').value;
    document.getElementById('out-diet').textContent = dietLabels[dietIdx];
    document.getElementById('out-car').textContent = carMi + ' mi';
    document.getElementById('out-flights').textContent = flights;
    document.getElementById('out-energy').textContent = energyLabels[energyIdx];
    const dietT = dietVals[dietIdx];
    const carT = (carMi*52/1000) * 0.4;
    const flightT = flights * 1.1;
    const energyT = energyVals[energyIdx];
    const total = dietT + carT + flightT + energyT;
    const el = document.getElementById('calc-total');
    animateNumber(el, displayedTotal, total, '<sup>t</sup>');
    displayedTotal = total;
    let compareText;
    if(total < 3){
    compareText = `Well under the ~2-ton <b>1.5°C-aligned</b> target range for 2050 already — your footprint is shaped more by systemic factors than most.`;
    } else if(total < 8){
    compareText = `Close to the current <b>global average</b> (~6.5t). A <b>1.5°C-aligned</b> path needs this near <b>2 tons</b> by 2050 — mostly via systemic change.`;
    } else {
    compareText = `Above the current <b>global average</b> (~6.5t) and well above the <b>1.5°C-aligned</b> target of ~2 tons by 2050. Flights and car miles usually move this number fastest.`;
    }
    document.getElementById('calc-compare').innerHTML = compareText;
    }
    ['in-diet','in-car','in-flights','in-energy'].forEach(id=>{
    document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', updateCalc);
    });
    updateCalc();
    /* ============ PLEDGE (with graceful storage fallback) ============ */
    const countEl = document.getElementById('pledge-count');
    const KEY_COUNT = 'pledge:count';
    async function loadCount(){
    try{
    if(window.storage){
    const res = await window.storage.get(KEY_COUNT, true);
    const n = res ? parseInt(res.value,10) : 0;
    countEl.innerHTML = `<b>${n.toLocaleString()}</b> people have signed the record on this page.`;
    return;
    }
    }catch(e){ /* key may not exist yet */ }
    countEl.innerHTML = `Be the first to sign the record on this page.`;
    }
    loadCount();
    document.getElementById('pledge-submit').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
    const action = document.getElementById('pledge-action').value;
    const confirm = document.getElementById('pledge-confirm');
    if(!action){
    confirm.textContent = 'Choose an action above first — one is enough.';
    confirm.classList.add('show');
    return;
    }
    confirm.innerHTML = `Signed. <em>"${action}"</em> is now part of the record. Keep it small enough to keep.`;
    confirm.classList.add('show');
    try{
    if(window.storage){
    let n = 0;
    try{
    const res = await window.storage.get(KEY_COUNT, true);
    n = res ? parseInt(res.value,10) : 0;
    }catch(e){ n = 0; }
    n += 1;
    await window.storage.set(KEY_COUNT, String(n), true);
    countEl.innerHTML = `<b>${n.toLocaleString()}</b> people have signed the record on this page.`;
    }
    }catch(e){ /* storage unavailable — confirmation still shown */ }
    });
    /* ============ GLOBE — DATA ============ */
    /* Extend the existing timelineData with an illustrative sea-level track,
    using the same "stay the course" vs "act now" shape as CO2/temp above. */
    function seaLevelCurrent(y){
    if(y<=2026){
    const t=(y-1850)/(2026-1850);
    return Math.pow(t,1.6)*21; // ~+21cm by 2026, matching observed record
    }
    const t=(y-2026)/(2100-2026);
    return 21 + Math.pow(t,1.3)*80; // continues steepening toward ~+100cm by 2100
    }
    function seaLevelAction(y){
    if(y<=2026) return seaLevelCurrent(y);
    const t=(y-2026)/(2100-2026);
    return 21 + Math.pow(t,1.05)*32; // slower rise, ~+53cm by 2100
    }
    timelineData.forEach(d=>{
    d.seaCur = seaLevelCurrent(d.year);
    d.seaAct = d.year<=2026 ? d.seaCur : seaLevelAction(d.year);
    });
    function globeDataForYear(y){
    const d = timelineData.reduce((a,b)=>Math.abs(b.year-y)<Math.abs(a.year-y)?b:a);
    const tempKey = currentScenario==='current' ? 'tempCur' : 'tempAct';
    const seaKey = currentScenario==='current' ? 'seaCur' : 'seaAct';
    return { year:y, temp:d[tempKey], sea:d[seaKey] };
    }
    /* Major capitals + a few sea-level-poster-child cities, lat/lon in degrees.
    `amp` = illustrative local warming amplification vs. the global mean
    (polar/high-latitude cities warm fastest; tropical cities warm slowest).
    `seaVuln` = illustrative sea-level exposure multiplier + risk tier. */
    const globeCities = [
    {id:'reykjavik', name:'Reykjavík', country:'Iceland', lat:64.1, lon:-21.9, amp:2.6, seaMult:0.6, risk:'moderate',
    note:'Sub-Arctic warming is running well ahead of the global average, reshaping fisheries and glacier melt feeding the island\'s rivers.'},
    {id:'nuuk', name:'Nuuk', country:'Greenland', lat:64.2, lon:-51.7, amp:2.9, seaMult:0.3, risk:'low',
    note:'Sits beside the Greenland ice sheet, whose accelerating melt is itself one of the larger contributors to sea-level rise felt everywhere else.'},
    {id:'moscow', name:'Moscow', country:'Russia', lat:55.8, lon:37.6, amp:1.8, seaMult:0.1, risk:'low',
    note:'Inland and far from the coast, but northern Russia\'s thawing permafrost releases carbon and destabilizes infrastructure across the country.'},
    {id:'london', name:'London', country:'United Kingdom', lat:51.5, lon:-0.1, amp:1.2, seaMult:0.9, risk:'moderate',
    note:'The Thames Barrier already closes more often than it did decades ago; a moderate-latitude coastal capital watching that trend continue.'},
    {id:'beijing', name:'Beijing', country:'China', lat:39.9, lon:116.4, amp:1.4, seaMult:0.4, risk:'moderate',
    note:'Faces intensifying heatwaves and water stress, even as its coastal sister cities further south carry the country\'s bigger flood risk.'},
    {id:'washington', name:'Washington, D.C.', country:'United States', lat:38.9, lon:-77.0, amp:1.3, seaMult:0.8, risk:'moderate',
    note:'Tidal flooding in the region\'s low-lying waterfront areas has become several times more frequent than it was mid-century.'},
    {id:'delhi', name:'New Delhi', country:'India', lat:28.6, lon:77.2, amp:1.1, seaMult:0.1, risk:'high',
    note:'Not a sea-level story — the risk here is extreme heat: summer wet-bulb conditions are edging toward the limits of human tolerance.'},
    {id:'cairo', name:'Cairo', country:'Egypt', lat:30.0, lon:31.2, amp:1.15, seaMult:1.1, risk:'high',
    note:'The Nile Delta just north of the city is one of the most sea-level-vulnerable, densely farmed regions on Earth.'},
    {id:'lagos', name:'Lagos', country:'Nigeria', lat:6.5, lon:3.4, amp:0.85, seaMult:1.4, risk:'high',
    note:'Rapid coastal growth meets rising seas and erosion — one of the fastest-growing megacities and most exposed coastlines at once.'},
    {id:'jakarta', name:'Jakarta', country:'Indonesia', lat:-6.2, lon:106.8, amp:0.8, seaMult:1.8, risk:'extreme',
    note:'Sinking under its own groundwater extraction while seas rise beneath it — a combination severe enough that Indonesia is relocating its capital inland.'},
    {id:'funafuti', name:'Funafuti', country:'Tuvalu', lat:-8.5, lon:179.2, amp:0.85, seaMult:2.4, risk:'extreme',
    note:'Averaging only a couple of meters above sea level, this atoll capital is the starkest case for how "abstract" centimeters become existential locally.'},
    {id:'sydney', name:'Sydney', country:'Australia', lat:-33.9, lon:151.2, amp:1.1, seaMult:0.9, risk:'moderate',
    note:'Faces compounding coastal erosion during storm surges and marine heatwaves stressing reef systems further north.'},
    ];
    /* ============ GLOBE — THREE.JS SCENE ============ */
    /* ============ GLOBE — EMBEDDED TEXTURES ============
    Earth imagery embedded as base64 so the globe renders identically whether
    this file is opened locally (file://) or hosted — no external image
    requests, no CORS/hotlink failures. Source: NASA Blue Marble / three.js
    example assets (public domain / CC-licensed planet textures). */
    const EARTH_TEX_COLOR = "data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/2wBDAAYEBAUEBAYFBQUGBgYHCQ4JCQgICRINDQoOFRIWFhUSFBQXGiEcFxgfGRQUHScdHyIjJSUlFhwpLCgkKyEkJST/2wBDAQYGBgkICREJCREkGBQYJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCQkJCT/wAARCAIABAADASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAHwAAAQUBAQEBAQEAAAAAAAAAAAECAwQFBgcICQoL/8QAtRAAAgEDAwIEAwUFBAQAAAF9AQIDAAQRBRIhMUEGE1FhByJxFDKBkaEII0KxwRVS0fAkM2JyggkKFhcYGRolJicoKSo0NTY3ODk6Q0RFRkdISUpTVFVWV1hZWmNkZWZnaGlqc3R1dnd4eXqDhIWGh4iJipKTlJWWl5iZmqKjpKWmp6ipqrKztLW2t7i5usLDxMXGx8jJytLT1NXW19jZ2uHi4+Tl5ufo6erx8vP09fb3+Pn6/8QAHwEAAwEBAQEBAQEBAQAAAAAAAAECAwQFBgcICQoL/8QAtREAAgECBAQDBAcFBAQAAQJ3AAECAxEEBSExBhJBUQdhcRMiMoEIFEKRobHBCSMzUvAVYnLRChYkNOEl8RcYGRomJygpKjU2Nzg5OkNERUZHSElKU1RVVldYWVpjZGVmZ2hpanN0dXZ3eHl6goOEhYaHiImKkpOUlZaXmJmaoqOkpaanqKmqsrO0tba3uLm6wsPExcbHyMnK0tPU1dbX2Nna4uPk5ebn6Onq8vP09fb3+Pn6/9oADAMBAAIRAxEAPwD6pooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKQnFLQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUZooAKKKKACiiigAopMmk3Z4GKAHUUZ4pN1AC0UgcGjOfWgBaKTmloAKKKRsjoM0ALRSF9vWo2uFQ4KuOcD5epoAlopnmHshP5UGTDAYOD39KAH0U3fzjacetOzQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFGaKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKKKKACiiigAooooAKAMUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRRQAUUUUAFFFFABRRketFABRUclzHEwVyQTyPlJH51T/AOEg0oeZvv7aPyyA3mOExnp1xSuBoUVUe4nkdHtPs0sP8ZMhz+GAR0pbya5EIayijnfIypkC8dyDg8/5zTAtVHLcRQo0kkioijLEngVzt14ofSCZdY097aDOBMJQwA7kggYFRQePtEu7d7m2GovErlDIljKyZzydwUjHTnPegDqRKrLuByOuRQJBxwa811b4qal4fJe+8PW89u/zRz2moAnbkDLoy7lPI4x39eKu/wDCzzI8gtNFmcIhcLczfZ5CuAeQ64B64GecfhS5kOx3pYg42n60iuWAIHB9civLIvjQ5QyP4euIBvAfzbpS231VQPmx6D05Oa7PSfFaatYm7Nlf28W3ckk0QXzBj7yjJJoUkwsdECSOcA+1B4GSRiucfxrpiMURL6bHyl47dsbh2zgf5NWbPxE9+ZFi0m9byzg5KAe3Jai4jR/tOy3tGLy28xRkr5gyPwzT4LuKdA0UiSKe6niqIk1d3/5B9jCgfBdrgk7PUAL1/Gkvtf0TRwI7/V7C0YLwLm5VSQP945NMDU38c7fzpBJnPHHY5zn3rJsNf03WreZtJu7e/IXcArfI2enOOh/GtONWaIB1CnA4U5H4UAS7x60BgRkc/SmKrjAJUr9MGnCNVBAAAPpx
