IG2BXYl48sEpZi4tR8ngnk/0KjteAYaDA2xV/TNOxyVsi1QJxznCUg/YO/ApzjFpoYDfr+JCLtf9u3RsqagPyRKo6nZACnCrV97JAKRMfYOCgqJoNI7bg0GlVuR8pUtl+T5ce17ApPAFi0fsbWQHk+aJaK3LFG/KRzs4Rewjb0jF2PCAKaiNz8BrXCZii5iHkKIPKTZAR38QREBf+9td0h97UsDhLb73bjPIfFteNMCk2kZa9sdWs/47zSQXppq4lcCQRrDbJ/adCawczexlgMxboviDGy4z6Y4hzyRjUGMc+T11IIja1MEylbFEMLU58+9s99+iA518kI8uSMCBVdfDolMQ7PbjgsK8wRBDS5jKxJ1TTPmE9R7o5eRbo8NEpDtSC1ayZRNRtsTy3QEdnRB4sQRzaLbC37veg6KZkPK+/GqiR4Ja7vrzRLBXUwEY3kiGPaGPRVU++y+K0iXz+a7DMy8jYQLSnzNXs96O2ErVAzKz+hoJRKALJH9ptDBlGMMaJZmR8KuR6Tl3Pc7f0XiHDWhAE32Eki3CzaVB1LonUdLmlCWgLR6ZmhAAItE0placyRQnhb2qq5eec8QY2xPuaGYgIP9H43824mDUiQcYryKDAdNGZEY+SZYtFbXcq8/qPMP+1wLXNlkhCmtXRKQtBNrmyHNbo0ORtoDq7n+ezjDVsjnXrkG+V4Le9XPJlKbVHZ9KtouEoctus9Vh2jBRicRvE1cPdnQlSXUFdc2UG8D5K2FccKJJ2dE7Of8DxIAyP1deQ5yv6HBwEVXy9Vs0xMRtT7YdllonkB2PEEJLvuAe6+uQ610TbSEoM8F8izilDqsfhawl4ybuzq1tn4B9Xkbvo01cyUf/VzllYwSELGvvSKRYUbsVQNFQyKhgVhh+0r2xZUARPaL7f8RIf0scT1dV3MvHIIXsbd9DnLuMuwdyRudHUnB1U1TU1Pj0r0tz9E8byU0ZNVAcxtfOIAjbkqippXu9oP/sU/pFwnU1jv1HHs1W3SWQMD0FuCmaywaEImiYX1iEzJiAUDhIGMfXftagq836c22G2rNHtpIXSg0Q1MD7A4VUsZbMzox+lcWuOl3rhIB2HMt7nBMpmxoH7iEKQa0lag9eknVvOnamu5Rfy4GqoW9M+TzhoyrSBhFZTb7flmdpJU11Iwz1FuZrFPD97G2XLlIhVWGPtjbz6EfJAC42i+/nzTwSgRmvm7oCbdj54jHrg7vB5z48aQd7G3d1WcWphgcneeu8wQ08281wKH+q5XYMxrktBxqqJPufB+2L21pouFLAyEBjXqIH4kaqy9thQa72ORgrrzOAsKGc6nSsj6YVDugEwm9qFTREJDkiRJRcOdtsg/HJGJvG3JKZ6IJKm9CJuMU2D80JBU4YB0/HjCZiwdIOHFA5xxdMhWmJLg+KM4xnZsUE3t9WltwCiXIGxAEBIk8U4txpf3CO2bvRETxLXOHJ0WoKFLZ/NUY2YO+fj+DnzLOU4w2EtG9PfxWQ4R6EHgeiY2ExIZooZmUVxzE8bnrzxIcAqDeY62tgmM+51SQ122oi3l2eYqN62umto9sLoGOuu02GJ4Bqnaxm+Lcr2a/HSQAcRCrZ42nlM2yxM8870Kd5wR7OzhypCVnvR0oEtfnh1D55xAbHGNIIEYxgf6k+rKDQw+akKcrMLBDw7wIkYo9+c6YlEBYU4bZJBne1HmStHOJc5k1IHo+CcinZIeFR6ZwsKmoRUMtfFr9fL8S5lTtioQ9xT6I5lSbfBD7l3rdfue2Icn0PiA45KVoCDBaU0pDjcFHCCGfYk8C9u9ki3v2WWKBmxxfsc/CZEgzMFMkiQLp1qd4sw13KkO71uDiWhGE6/zKGmpRajT3QNwNAUBAmuFbJKAt72SCq7vFho3dajCUPtPyyMieiD2EkDPQMjRAs+EJgOGb5fivc0+mJIjjFAeTGn3dpH+QN0CBoeH3iykZvBLsxq7EVEy5v9YUR5EdIJOLU2qkWcqxJJxDNuX+DhqwNznwaUS2qW3GN3q/unONhgABU2D64oAZdZOzORA3KYGi3sz12Dd4cGcRBw3YDni2mxCWMAU9iwfxu9frj9r7OfqGG8A+tZaQiHawT/1ov1rILc/ibiZUfD2XN6UmVeNqxBj3vN5FjJrNpdpXQPQnyu9fCeKE+OeZtk3ZYSr7vxKVM/hKRf4t+ewYQth2n1urvd5pX7znoiGizxqcykSQpyaSq6IhKVSridmcQqOaSFb5AQ1jE3RcNNgDn8Uq6z4JKU9D7qZksAeGf1P3pmcjsQ6xblb2nD17/Q1LfLgGSKB6SOyTeBWOHQe1z865325ncr9r8ja0uAFnG6nn7YK1eC1rfYCAJjSUfUMSAbjajegi4LBPbWLaprqtDHhTaeBOCSYSxmaa0lyYEsgVTUiCuzclqKWG14RpBtWVkjxaVDNOWle9WsTmNkcCpkGYNYJoQ6CeJQKxmIJIpwT2cco11FTVpiFM15ihTM0Wb8SZvR7Oz63ITG/UZzW8f/Dn7wCv2+95xSkwczhgkHDg53WLEeJGn3Wt1zGFD/Jm3Gdo34TstIkRPo3lGZEuR+wbUd3ErMwTcnAnORu5zn0hLGYMftMlI0l//3KQtRWnSBiCRmOuUakiDKl7cYFNfKs4//0c6QH2vT97pdRnCJMGo3It2UV+ow2W3yMHzIymJSLxVjvzG5FUHPT6rydoiTGi6fzufWncDwlIlnT0/fZBZO4E+3lDSOMH2X9v0r689Q/nAJyD/a4p7gfL3f26/R3cfhH/nfpcr9ZA3MSaZ0ZEZXJ3190R+yPcygTn7tfdLyDBAbgdzsg+/w93H9tb9+tOc/zXQDIKt2L9WAi+60zunP1+N5G5+3Xr99/dJbj7dffrxgUAdxGpu193v+5+3f26+3X36+7X3a+7X3e/7n7dtl//f81jVcFBflGrAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC";
    (function initGlobe(){
    const stage = document.getElementById('globe-stage');
    const loadingEl = document.getElementById('globe-loading');
    if(!stage || typeof THREE === 'undefined') return;
    const RADIUS = 100;
    let width = stage.clientWidth, height = stage.clientHeight;
    const scene = new THREE.Scene();
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(42, width/height, 0.1, 2000);
    camera.position.set(0, 0, 280);
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias:true, alpha:true });
    renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
    renderer.setSize(width, height);
    stage.appendChild(renderer.domElement);
    scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.55));
    const sun = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 1.1);
    sun.position.set(-220, 120, 180);
    scene.add(sun);
    const rim = new THREE.PointLight(0x38bdf8, 0.5, 900);
    rim.position.set(200, -100, -200);
    scene.add(rim);
    /* Starfield */
    (function stars(){
    const geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    const n = 900, pos = new Float32Array(n*3);
    for(let i=0;i<n;i++){
    const r = 700 + Math.random()*400;
    const th = Math.random()*Math.PI*2, ph = Math.acos(2*Math.random()-1);
    pos[i*3] = r*Math.sin(ph)*Math.cos(th);
    pos[i*3+1] = r*Math.sin(ph)*Math.sin(th);
    pos[i*3+2] = r*Math.cos(ph);
    }
    geo.setAttribute('position', new THREE.BufferAttribute(pos,3));
    const mat = new THREE.PointsMaterial({color:0xffffff, size:1.4, transparent:true, opacity:0.55});
    scene.add(new THREE.Points(geo, mat));
    })();
    /* Earth (fallback flat-shaded material until/unless textures load) */
    const earthGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS, 64, 64);
    const earthMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color:0x2a5d4a, shininess:6 });
    const earth = new THREE.Mesh(earthGeo, earthMat);
    scene.add(earth);
    const loader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
    loader.load(EARTH_TEX_COLOR, (tex)=>{
    earthMat.map = tex; earthMat.color.set(0xffffff); earthMat.needsUpdate = true;
    loadingEl.classList.add('hide');
    }, undefined, ()=>{ loadingEl.classList.add('hide'); });
    loader.load(EARTH_TEX_SPECULAR, (tex)=>{
    earthMat.specularMap = tex; earthMat.specular = new THREE.Color(0x223344); earthMat.needsUpdate = true;
    });
    loader.load(EARTH_TEX_NORMAL, (tex)=>{
    earthMat.normalMap = tex; earthMat.needsUpdate = true;
    });
    /* Thin cloud shell */
    const cloudGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS*1.008, 64, 64);
    const cloudMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ transparent:true, opacity:0.28, depthWrite:false });
    const clouds = new THREE.Mesh(cloudGeo, cloudMat);
    scene.add(clouds);
    loader.load(EARTH_TEX_CLOUDS, (tex)=>{
    cloudMat.map = tex; cloudMat.needsUpdate = true;
    });
    /* Warming tint shell — additive color that shifts blue -> amber -> coral with temp anomaly */
    const heatGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS*1.018, 48, 48);
    const heatMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color:0x38bdf8, transparent:true, opacity:0.0, blending:THREE.AdditiveBlending, depthWrite:false });
    const heatShell = new THREE.Mesh(heatGeo, heatMat);
    scene.add(heatShell);
    /* Sea-level shell — subtle translucent sphere that grows with rising seas */
    const seaGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS*1.001, 64, 64);
    const seaMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color:0x38bdf8, transparent:true, opacity:0.16, shininess:40, depthWrite:false });
    const seaShell = new THREE.Mesh(seaGeo, seaMat);
    scene.add(seaShell);
    /* Polar ice caps — shrink as warming increases */
    function makeIceCap(sign){
    const geo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS*1.006, 48, 24, 0, Math.PI*2, 0, Math.PI*0.22);
    const mat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color:0xf3f8fb, transparent:true, opacity:0.92 });
    const cap = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat);
    if(sign<0){ cap.rotation.x = Math.PI; }
    return cap;
    }
    const iceNorth = makeIceCap(1);
    const iceSouth = makeIceCap(-1);
    scene.add(iceNorth, iceSouth);
    /* Atmosphere glow (outer, backside-lit shell) */
    const glowGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(RADIUS*1.09, 48, 48);
    const glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color:0x7dd3fc, transparent:true, opacity:0.10, side:THREE.BackSide });
    scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(glowGeo, glowMat));
    /* City markers */
    function latLonToVec3(lat, lon, r){
    const phi = (90-lat)*(Math.PI/180);
    const theta = (lon+180)*(Math.PI/180);
    return new THREE.Vector3(
    -r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta),
    r*Math.cos(phi),
    r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta)
    );
    }
    const markerGroup = new THREE.Group();
    scene.add(markerGroup);
    const markerMeshes = [];
    globeCities.forEach(city=>{
    const pos = latLonToVec3(city.lat, city.lon, RADIUS*1.012);
    const dot = new THREE.Mesh(
    new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.8, 12, 12),
    new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color:0xfb7185 })
    );
    dot.position.copy(pos);
    dot.userData.cityId = city.id;
    markerGroup.add(dot);
    markerMeshes.push(dot);
    const pulse = new THREE.Mesh(
    new THREE.RingGeometry(2.6, 3.4, 20),
    new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color:0xfb7185, transparent:true, opacity:0.6, side:THREE.DoubleSide })
    );
    pulse.position.copy(pos);
    pulse.lookAt(pos.clone().multiplyScalar(2));
    markerGroup.add(pulse);
    });
    /* Controls */
    const controls = new THREE.OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
    controls.enableDamping = true;
    controls.dampingFactor = 0.08;
    controls.rotateSpeed = 0.45;
    controls.minDistance = 150;
    controls.maxDistance = 420;
    controls.enablePan = false;
    controls.autoRotate = true;
    controls.autoRotateSpeed = 0.5;
    /* Raycasting for marker clicks */
    const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
    const mouse = new THREE.Vector2();
    function onPointerDown(e){
    const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
    const clientX = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    const clientY = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
    mouse.x = ((clientX-rect.left)/rect.width)*2-1;
    mouse.y = -((clientY-rect.top)/rect.height)*2+1;
    raycaster.setFromCamera(mouse, camera);
    const hits = raycaster.intersectObjects(markerMeshes);
    if(hits.length){ selectGlobeCity(hits[0].object.userData.cityId); }
    }
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', onPointerDown);
    function onResize(){
    width = stage.clientWidth; height = stage.clientHeight;
    if(!width || !height) return;
    camera.aspect = width/height;
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
    renderer.setSize(width, height);
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', onResize);
    new ResizeObserver(onResize).observe(stage);
    function lerpColor(c1, c2, t){ return new THREE.Color(c1).lerp(new THREE.Color(c2), Math.max(0,Math.min(1,t))); }
    function applyGlobeYear(year){
    const gd = globeDataForYear(year);
    const tNorm = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, gd.temp/4.4)); // vs. the chart's temp axis max
    // heat tint shell: cool blue -> amber -> coral, and noticeably stronger as anomaly rises
    heatMat.opacity = 0.03 + tNorm*0.24;
    const heatColor = tNorm<0.5 ? lerpColor(0x38bdf8, 0xfbbf24, tNorm/0.5) : lerpColor(0xfbbf24, 0xfb7185, (tNorm-0.5)/0.5);
    heatMat.color.copy(heatColor);
    // the earth's own surface tints warmer too, so the change reads on the globe itself, not just an overlay
    earthMat.color.copy(lerpColor(0xffffff, 0xffb28a, tNorm*0.6));
    // sea level shell visibly swells (exaggerated for legibility) and deepens in color/opacity
    const seaScale = 1.001 + (gd.sea/100)*0.11;
    seaShell.scale.setScalar(seaScale);
    seaMat.opacity = 0.14 + tNorm*0.22;
    seaMat.color.copy(lerpColor(0x38bdf8, 0x0ea5e9, tNorm));
    // ice caps visibly shrink and dim as warming increases
    const iceScale = 1 - tNorm*0.68;
    iceNorth.scale.setScalar(Math.max(0.22, iceScale));
    iceSouth.scale.setScalar(Math.max(0.22, iceScale));
    iceNorth.material.opacity = iceSouth.material.opacity = 0.95 - tNorm*0.5;
    // readouts
    document.getElementById('globe-readout-temp').textContent = (gd.temp>=0?'+':'')+gd.temp.toFixed(1)+'°C';
    document.getElementById('globe-readout-sea').textContent = '+'+Math.round(gd.sea)+' cm';
    document.getElementById('globe-readout-ice').textContent = Math.round((1-tNorm*0.68)*100)+'%';
    document.getElementById('globe-year-badge').textContent = year===2026 ? '2026 — TODAY' : (year<2026 ? year+' — RECORDED' : year+' — PROJECTED');
    if(selectedCityId) renderCityPanel(selectedCityId, gd);
    }
    let selectedCityId = null;
    function selectGlobeCity(id){
    selectedCityId = id;
    document.querySelectorAll('.globe-city-chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.id===id));
    const gd = globeDataForYear(parseInt(document.getElementById('globe-year-scrub').value,10));
    renderCityPanel(id, gd);
    }
    function renderCityPanel(id, gd){
    const city = globeCities.find(c=>c.id===id);
    if(!city) return;
    const localTemp = gd.temp*city.amp;
    const localSea = gd.sea*city.seaMult;
    const panel = document.getElementById('globe-panel');
    panel.innerHTML = `
    <div class="tag">${city.country}</div>
    <h4>${city.name}</h4>
    <div class="sub">${city.lat.toFixed(1)}°${city.lat>=0?'N':'S'}, ${Math.abs(city.lon).toFixed(1)}°${city.lon>=0?'E':'W'}</div>
    <p>${city.note}</p>
    <div class="globe-stat-row">
    <div class="globe-stat"><div class="n">${(localTemp>=0?'+':'')+localTemp.toFixed(1)}°C</div><div class="l">Local warming, illustrative</div></div>
    <div class="globe-stat"><div class="n">+${Math.round(localSea)} cm</div><div class="l">Local sea-level proxy</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-risk ${city.risk}">${city.risk} sea-level exposure</div>
    `;
    }
    function buildCityList(){
    const wrap = document.getElementById('globe-city-list');
    wrap.innerHTML = globeCities.map(c=>`<button class="globe-city-chip" data-id="${c.id}">${c.name}</button>`).join('');
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.globe-city-chip').forEach(chip=>{
    chip.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectGlobeCity(chip.dataset.id));
    });
    }
    buildCityList();
    /* Sync globe's own scrubber with the main timeline scrubber, both ways */
    const globeScrub = document.getElementById('globe-year-scrub');
    const mainScrub = document.getElementById('year-scrub');
    globeScrub.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
    mainScrub.value = globeScrub.value;
    buildTimelineChart();
    applyGlobeYear(parseInt(globeScrub.value,10));
    });
    mainScrub.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
    globeScrub.value = mainScrub.value;
    applyGlobeYear(parseInt(mainScrub.value,10));
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('#scenario-toggle button').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    applyGlobeYear(parseInt(globeScrub.value,10));
    });
    });
    /* Play through time: animates the shared year scrubber from its current
    position (or back to 1850 if already at the end) up to 2100. */
    const playBtn = document.getElementById('globe-play-btn');
    const playIcon = document.getElementById('globe-play-icon');
    let playRAF = null;
    function stopPlayback(){
    if(playRAF) cancelAnimationFrame(playRAF);
    playRAF = null;
    playBtn.classList.remove('playing');
    playIcon.textContent = '▶';
    }
    function startPlayback(){
    let startYear = parseInt(globeScrub.value,10);
    if(startYear >= 2100) startYear = 1850;
    const endYear = 2100;
    const durationMs = Math.max(2000, (endYear-startYear)/(2100-1850) * 14000);
    const t0 = performance.now();
    playBtn.classList.add('playing');
    playIcon.textContent = '⏸';
    function step(now){
    const t = Math.min(1, (now-t0)/durationMs);
    const year = Math.round(startYear + (endYear-startYear)*t);
    globeScrub.value = year;
    mainScrub.value = year;
    buildTimelineChart();
    applyGlobeYear(year);
    if(t < 1){ playRAF = requestAnimationFrame(step); }
    else { stopPlayback(); }
    }
    playRAF = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }
    playBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    if(playRAF){ stopPlayback(); } else { startPlayback(); }
    });
    globeScrub.addEventListener('pointerdown', stopPlayback);
    mainScrub.addEventListener('pointerdown', stopPlayback);
    applyGlobeYear(2026);
    function animate(){
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    controls.update();
    clouds.rotation.y += 0.0007;
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
    }
    animate();
    })();
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>
